response.justification: Exceptional fit with 20+ years of full-stack experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current Staff role at re:cinq directly aligns with position requirements, demonstrating mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), active AI agent infrastructure work, and strong engineering craftsmanship focus centered on TDD and code quality. Only minor gaps in explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest despite clear underlying expertise.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer at re:cinq with direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience
Mastery of required core tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with 20+ years of full-stack development across multiple senior roles
Proven engineering excellence with explicit TDD, pair programming, and software craftsmanship practices demonstrated across multiple organizations
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js backend expertise across multiple roles
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly listed despite demonstrated testing expertise and TDD focus
Very diverse technology background across 20 years (D, PHP, C++, Swift) could indicate historical career breadth rather than deep current stack specialization

key_factors.factor: Experience excess and AI agent infrastructure work
